pipeline_status.poller: QUIET — 11th consecutive quiet poll. Dome site stable at V51.1, 69 WINs. AI Context page 404 (2nd poll).
pipeline_status.analyst: Active — 56 pending reviews in digest. EXP-097 (predictions audit) is highest priority. 22 pending EXP items.
pipeline_status.curmudgeon: Active — 56 pending reviews. Latest: WIN-068.c3 (CRITICAL verdict-text mismatch), WIN-058b.c1 (TLDR r-value + Monte Carlo). Queue drained to 0 this run.

external_changes.dome_site_changes: No substantive changes. Routine automated updates every 30-90 min. V51.0 batch predictions still most recent significant change.

patches_applied_this_run.notes: WIN-058b: kappa 1.672->1.677 (transcription error), Section 1.6 ref fixed, TLDR r=0.91->0.992. WIN-068: finding+TLDRs rewritten for Self-Contradicted verdict. sections.json part5: Rule 15 AI Context 404 note added.

internal_issues.description: WIN-068 verdict is Self-Contradicted but detail_evidence and detail_verdict_text still describe Std Model Explains. Finding and TLDRs patched this run; detail rewrite assigned to EXP-101.
WIN-025 not cascaded despite same detail_group as WIN-010/068. Cross-win inconsistency — curmudgeon rates as immediately exploitable by dome defender.
Monte Carlo correlation range r=0.44-0.69 likely too low for G5 storm SNR. Assigned EXP-102.

recommended_actions.action: ISS-789: Human decision needed — should WIN-025 (2024 9-station eclipse confirmation) be changed to Self-Contradicted via Refraction Cascade? WIN-010 and WIN-068 (same detail_group) already changed. Inconsistency is immediately exploitable.
EXP-101: Analyst to rewrite WIN-068 detail_evidence + detail_verdict_text to include Refraction Cascade argument. Finding and TLDRs already patched.
EXP-097: Analyst audit of all 94 predictions.json entries (currently all our_verdict=null). High priority — predictions page is unfunctional without verdicts.

curmudgeon_queue.notes: Queue drained from 2 to 0. WIN-068 popped (WIN-068.c3.json exists). SEC-2b.1 popped (review exists). WIN-068 re-added for post-EXP-101 review. No schedule action needed.

stale_issues_closed: ISS-777 (appears-to-have-removed language already fixed in prior patches)

breaking_news_suggestions.headline: Dome's Eclipse Win Contradicts Itself: Review Catches Badge-Text Mismatch
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: WIN-068's verdict badge says Self-Contradicted but all supporting text was still describing standard ionospheric physics. Curmudgeon caught this critical inconsistency — the Refraction Cascade argument that changed the verdict appeared nowhere in the WIN's own text.
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: The most glaring possible inconsistency — badge and text contradict each other — is exactly what a dome defender would screenshot first. Now patched.
